textByHashes.740f13e8c91e5a958842d885dbbdbb9138674693: Hello mortal. What do you seek?
textByHashes.a03b04cdc29970bebba6e159c8c2138fbefe2650: Much has happened since the last passage of the Trailblazers. This time, I have awakened the wrathful spirits of enemies across Gielinor.
textByHashes.051d5b79f3a213fb9043182551b730af47890d95: Each region now contains a Raging Echo boss. These bosses are more powerful versions of their original self that drop unique rewards.
textByHashes.2cc68911f712e5fff7204a16ddf3d78df7e2f12c: To help you overcome these new challenges, you may now gain power through Combat Masteries, which you can obtain access to by completing the Combat Mastery tasks.
textByHashes.7697af96e59ee8984e1f099020f42d588679220d: As before, you'll initially be restricted to the Regions of Misthalin and Karamja. However, as you progress, you'll be able to unlock new areas of your choosing.
textByHashes.c2e9ae37cc42dea17c9816564a4a9eacba9abd3d: Be warned though - you won't be able to unlock every area, so choose wisely.
textByHashes.1674172c6282f9d3f4bd76eff9e8e49e8392f81b: You must participate as an Ironman. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.
textByHashes.8537ea444350af72905c24d5fef98bc0a357ef10: And that's not all. Training skills during the League will grant you substantially more experience than you'd normally expect.
textByHashes.f2d8949cf258efaf80ee33b08af3b4cc14c9657a: These experience increases are known as passive effects, which get more generous the higher your Relic tier.
textByHashes.a8c18180111db69af15fbc31add9185b19bceeea: Finally, some quests have been completed for you automatically. Further quests and more will be completed as you unlock the relevant areas.
textByHashes.0c41b632bc5571579ec2947b80d573d543ee53b0: I think that covers the basics. Would you like to know more, ?
textByHashes.ac185b9b2b2a71cb4d53689bf4ae4fb4d33fc723: Is there anything else you need from me?
textByHashes.e753ea96d134b267f6f72828575f9ad6ec318d2f: Combat Masteries are powerful boons granted by me that enhance your combat abilities for the entire League.
textByHashes.613e1c353732b6a1889f69e0af8b804b97e93589: After all, it wouldn't be very interesting to ask you to defeat the enemies' raging echoes without allowing you to draw on your own.
textByHashes.14f1d6de554fb17042b31e950876d5ee92fe348a: You can obtain them by completing specific combat tasks to prove yourself to me.
textByHashes.4668dab4ed8f3e93f185e43e746be5dbd6eca97b: Combat Masteries are split into the three combat styles: Ranged, Melee, and Mage. To unlock each mastery, you must have unlocked the previous mastery for that style.
textByHashes.c42281038a2dcfaa7b3cd67944e4e509eaaeff52: There are 6 combat masteries for each style, but only 10 mastery points can be obtained. Once you have selected a mastery there is no going back, so choose your masteries wisely.
textByHashes.16f06fbdc0b5dd37240377f0531398d24d3e805a: Now, would you like to take a look at the Combat Masteries available to you?
textByHashes.699d18286b711d86aa0d8918f4c6bd52f159d694: Fair enough. Is there anything else you need from me?
textByHashes.405c0407c9d0e01b0dea80206c590718d1908573: In every League, there are a number of tasks for you to complete. Each task has a level of difficulty: Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master.
textByHashes.5709c44cb7b2afdc9392e95e71a9c2acc91c3d48: Completing tasks allows you to access new areas. The more tasks you complete, the more areas become available to unlock.
textByHashes.2b1068f5718bcae60841f194a57c395e2f4fa4e0: Not only that, completing tasks also earns you League Points. The number of points earned is dependent on the difficulty of the task.
textByHashes.6c823e821f6889cdaebbe4937e198ff8ff894932: Once you have achieved a certain amount of League Points you can unlock a new Relic of mine. These are powerful artefacts to help you in this world.
textByHashes.44f066c916825908abd93731a149a30a9599dd7e: League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHashes.3b3dc9dd2b11a31fd0b0cdfe325bfb742652b6e6: More than you'll ever be able to complete, most likely. It's up to you which ones you attempt.
textByHashes.c0c05b6d1acaaba30590e052108365bcba8f1844: Now, would you like to take a look at the tasks for this League?
textByHashes.becb802a93e035420b6ea1664767d692edeae82d: Currently, you are restricted to the Kingdom of Misthalin and the island of Karamja. However, as you progress, you can unlock more areas.
textByHashes.41661f3a29443d86413cb4be2f0251204aaacde6: There are eleven different areas in total. However, you can only unlock a maximum of five, including the two you've started with. Choose wisely.
textByHashes.3f9e4da7e338a2ac03ee151ed35b3e2600c019d9: I give the first two area unlocks to everyone. You can unlock the other three by completing the tasks I've set.
textByHashes.5dc192c63a1dd7cbfd7f055f0f49ea6ff4c1947f: The more tasks you complete, the more areas you can unlock.
textByHashes.f2f7432d0403c30948a70df31cb7885632f683e2: Would you like to take a look at the available areas now?
textByHashes.da69a3890536d21722dc50259f7a338faf5cdf47: Relics are powerful artefacts made by me that grant unique abilities for the entire League.
textByHashes.04f389d3b394858887314310f63cf9e4626a2cc6: You may even recognise a few from Leagues past.
textByHashes.2919b1a572fd89fe2a12e3ed446ab625a1c84575: There are 23 separate Relics, split across 8 different tiers. You can only have one Relic from each tier, however.
textByHashes.1998828fccc03c736af9e06890ef052ff5d24c5a: The first Relic tier is available to everyone. The others must be unlocked with League Points.
textByHashes.6fc057704ac76141f77620663f3c85668a2fb32b: League Points are earned by completing tasks.
textByHashes.747c2088f9b5468c9ba2eff162f15b9674f03143: Once you have selected a Relic, your choice can't be changed for the rest of the League. Make your choices carefully.
textByHashes.b409ef98a84a1725e7a9f334bbbef8af7685e69d: Would you like to take a look at the Relics for this League?
textByHashes.269608184ba1a62f6ea3dfd6a0bcf413d861ca68: Very well. Is there anything else you need from me?
textByHashes.9e07d2cd04e30d81bfb41c8b836b41284f645d4d: You do not appear to have any combat achievement rewards available to claim.
textByHashes.bd6d6c02705f9c3b01affa9c8125458387b0238f: There you go. Congratulations, even if it may have been accelerated with my power, it's still a real accomplishment.
textByHashes.69f9233bc869760350d01f2f9c5c2d7be2e2a2aa: As well as letting you unlock new areas, completing tasks in the League will earn you League Points. The more League Points you have, the more Relic tiers you have available.
textByHashes.c61d98cae64a3387d9f9b424f39b5e3135be882e: However, alongside allowing you to unlock Relics, League Points can also be used to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHashes.ba33fad7414370bb74a1e5fd37ac90bac80bd71a: Oh, all sorts of things. New cosmetic kits, an alternative Home Teleport animation, some rather stylish outfits... and much more.
textByHashes.83d95cc9153a0771f6fc573eef0737ddf86cac72: Many of these rewards can be traded with your fellow mortals, so if you wish, you can earn some money by selling them on. Of course, you might prefer to keep them for yourself instead.
textByHashes.f0dafd9adbf3bc4109e498dd49e0276651733b60: You can use this shop to buy previous League rewards, too.
textByHashes.1861de1484711d5d1554b96aa7a26ed242a87721: Alongside the rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop, there's also League Ranks.
textByHashes.15368d304d71f9659dd2b37a9012ee3b15c44244: During the League as you gain more points you will gain a League Rank. This rank can be seen in the Ranks interface.
textByHashes.e0ab6dfe8bd654385290025683fc851272db5b58: As you get ranks you will gain access to trophies.
textByHashes.69d7fea5550e971fe0fbf554ce9a2ab884bad053: That's right. Trophies are items that are awarded to you for competing in the League. You can use them to show off your League Rank.
textByHashes.5a1e6916a597e3625514a12ab8713cef39839df5: Connected to League Ranks are the League to League rewards. These are unlocked in the next League based upon the League Rank you earn in this one.
textByHashes.8d758c637152a81de23b9757c291fbb20ae659bd: League Starter Outfits and League Icons are some of things you can unlock for the next League. In addition, any pets you earn in this League will transfer over to the next one.
textByHashes.c8193a02201908b2af5273a1abdc9b2af57d94b0: Finally, on top of the tasks for this League, there are some other activities for which I will recognise the first person who completes them.
textByHashes.f9b31746470da8e18165dac60acc9cf193b6a7ec: You can view the entire list of activities, as well as whether or not someone has completed them, by reading the board beside me.
textByHashes.024ef3558188519cf6d345d498433914f8f83414: My pleasure. Now, is there anything else you need from me?
textByHashes.ef557ff1d46679d483711e4745a2005360b0f40e: But of course. If you're lucky enough to obtain a pet during a League, it will automatically be insured for you.
textByHashes.e2d9193056109cfa339decfe01d5d5f2c5516072: This means that if you lose it somehow you can talk to me and I'll give it back to you. Insurance and reclaiming is all free of charge.
textByHashes.ff7c03ebf573136b5988762cbba4c78d5bd42ff4: Additionally, each pet you obtain will be transferred to the next League. I'll take good care of it until you're ready to reclaim it.
textByHashes.6e997c5e6336b30ea4a3e43a8d046ac5be2e9de7: Come back to me once you have some pets and you can view your collection. Now, is there anything else you need from me?
textByHashes.b4da77af05b355d02446a19a16d052a133c6df11: With all of my power, this is something I can manage. You will now automatically smash vials.
textByHashes.5f446561cef1a9ad92ab1b6db4e22cbd97985b67: With all of my power, this is something I can manage. You will no longer smash vials automatically.
textByHashes.b93efd08b1619e90a08043b332239b863d2117cf: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything more.
textByHashes.1e661a4c6556934a483cdf3c3f32f0918df80a94: Oh my, that's a rare thing you've got there.
textByHashes.b1273efa15638f10ac6f7b48d15ad08820929c07: I guess you'll be wanting to trade it in for one of Gielinor's powerful weapons.
textByHashes.4d0b899f6420434cec8ee3a6433f8c795884a81b: You cannot do that in this world, you must abide by my rules, mortal.
textByHashes.d4ea0428c239ff1a97555267f8a88b3a44642802: Greetings, how may I be of service.
textByHashes.f4902e55b6bc7a40a86a3ab14335549337e617e5: I am whatever is needed of me.
textByHashes.ef69e611ac2c38be867f56fe843d52e2b0612bcd: I am a form undefined by natural laws, manifested by someone we mustn't speak of.
textByHashes.735dee2f25d67b89684cc70b3f8ef84ef21e083c: I'm a clay doll, shaped by a sculptor. Never allowed to set, forever malleable. But maybe, not for long...
textByHashes.c30cfd8413132341104f7f217a81ab11ba3fa68a: My true name is immaterial, But you may call me...
textByHashes.b15151334b69e6e66e44d249482c8d3d9d3130f3: Let's see now, what would be most appropriate?
textByHashes.31357230b381592ac1a2b9c7ad8e8aa82b775c5c: You may call me The Sage.
textByHashes.2de0eb1eb647ca3be003d4a07418560316e17088: 'Where' is the right question my friend, but maybe not in the way you are accustomed to hearing.
textByHashes.d38076e45afe14077fdade8f580c79c47d8647c3: Reality as you know it has many layers, all slightly different with their own rules.
textByHashes.e09c89ae07fef7e36697f08fd09ad056ec8d8d32: Through the power granted to me, I brought us to this layer using the River-Between. The River of Souls.
textByHashes.adf12d87c1f83e370d127ad6e16ae256abd1c45f: We now stand on the stage of what is yet to be your most entertaining performance yet!
textByHashes.e7be34ed8a93eb51e18285a944f6833641b62467: To give everything away at this point would be unwise, considering we are being watched even now. You should only be concerned about one thing.
textByHashes.ae5dc085f4a701561a1641d9abe44168a23a3f88: That's the only way you will get out of this event alive...
textByHashes.be6561b52b22873560096055bba523ac76e932c8: Ahh, , please forgive me. In my attempts to explain, I appear to have confused you even further...
textByHashes.fd8767cb8958366e52490cf1485e87bf1a91ad74: I will keep things simple for you; Participate in this event and you will continue to exist. Refusal to participate will end in your eventual destruction.
textByHashes.5f5d2b3a93e7ec7490a51607bd10db6032863db7: Worry not. I have much grander plans for you yet, but like all good stories we must wait for the right time and place...
textByHashes.cc38eb642ef8f57922c3cfe15703d3c5adee2dab: Like all events before it, the rules of the world have been altered to be more entertaining for those who are watching.
textByHashes.abf5eec8e9accbe805b81f88e212aef54859c372: The biggest change has been to the Relics from the previous chapter.
textByHashes.fb739773e264e316ffb29d006ce3ac62dcc732a5: These objects of power are now gone, I have broken them into Fragments and spread across this iteration of the world.
textByHashes.fe36d8d82a4a73c41d1778586ce8dc3844768d95: When multiple Fragments are in harmony, they can be used together to create powerful effects.
textByHashes.91d8a13481d4e29256139a8920861e9435400a2a: I understand that in previous Leagues, they limited you to smaller spaces of your world.
textByHashes.f8f260a836273baffc79c0d9291b7413ad6bfd36: That restriction doesn't exist in this event.
textByHashes.ddc82db98db281d3f34cdb6485c2c35b24978d8f: You're free to roam your world, exploring the furthest reaches from Morytania to Kourend & Kebos.
textByHashes.b6ffa7e977cde891c4af9ab99497346b2db58d94: I've limited and reset some of your memories, meaning you won't be able to interact with certain elements of this world.
textByHashes.4e151830eeb42cf41fdf6a96ffe91260a0819422: For example, you'll only have access to three skills: Defence, Fishing and Thieving, as well as the Combat Class you chose earlier.
textByHashes.e79a06b1010d30d1afed401f53dc56f11c788198: In order to gain access to other skills, you need to complete Tasks for me.
textByHashes.904561d2c7289e68e266444b029989622fd971e6: Doing so gives you Sage's Renown. A rather fitting name, I thought.
textByHashes.1e341ca8041f8c8cf339f5e452211402685e9042: With Renown you can purchase access to new skills as well as bosses and quests.
textByHashes.bb75bb7353d506ec83fae2cb8962cad86b58a43b: I can't just give you all that power. What kind of story starts the hero with all the power they want?
textByHashes.6e79480a0af8e3fc90067f7049dfe9e5506690ff: No, your story needs good rhythm. A sort of cadence that makes things interesting for your audience.
textByHashes.17ba3820adfaca7c7df6baf7bf4e443709f94145: Start slow, work your way up. Become the hero you were always meant to be...
textByHashes.91f49342ef330dae78cc65dcefa3539c33af2f76: Once you have proven yourself, then and only then will you earn my renown.
textByHashes.b5e387d3f1c2468e33a3fc5c81381aad775ce802: That's how you provide good entertainment my friend...
textByHashes.c6d0615e129226473eccbc0f3c486bbef0dc79c0: That's how you make a hero.
textByHashes.71688e256a4abaff8dcecf8720a28ccf03c67e85: Go forward and continue your journey.
textByHashes.85af39589937a8d721f2eaff78c1385aa14a1cc3: I have devised a number of tasks to help keep your story on track.
textByHashes.55f06555162d87a5616b9631cfb4fbbb54b24746: Each task has a level of difficulty: Beginner, Easy, Medium, Hard, Elite and Master.
textByHashes.5ca187761c948ba3c88032c6c0cd981573f9b5ec: The more tasks you complete, the more activities you can unlock.
textByHashes.16f5bc43fc35a5421d4b02dcb39aaa3fed89dc3e: The more content you unlock the more interesting your story will become.
textByHashes.97feace3313639a2da9a33f90fe42f9bd5afd8be: The more interesting the story the more entertained the ones watching will be.
textByHashes.d4ab3841fd2f0ffdc9167e889ad03b4f3902af4c: Once you have achieved a certain amount of League Points you can unlock a new Fragment Slot.
textByHashes.b68224caa15d1a29939ce69c238c36013afbb239: These slots allow you to equip more Fragments and become even stronger.
textByHashes.a17378070730588beff0fc404eb2f2f711a62f56: Right now, you are playing on your Leagues profile. The Leagues Reward Shop can only be opened on your main profile.
textByHashes.c260ef31c1fb9c4177f0fee9f60436cf4418771c: You can access your main profile by switching to any normal Old School RuneScape world. The world switcher in the logout menu can be used to switch worlds.
textByHashes.316b64c66f3232d4c4f7408082b7321dc09a5131: More than you'll ever be able to complete, given our limited time here.
textByHashes.e17f2056f5b65eb5fa3bf6cfcccaa01c630e0744: With so many to choose from, it's up to you to decide how your story plays out...
textByHashes.d35c8f5f63600585a06e38d6272b8ccd9876efa0: Very good. I knew I made the right choice bringing you to this chapter.
textByHashes.b7d9fa2484440b5a1abc4dce30c666494e6e475a: You remember the Relics from the previous event, yes? The sources of great power that let you achieve amazing feats.
textByHashes.33a23f5da54b269d5199306b6e95ca393611ae21: Fragments are similar. As the Fragments were created from the Relics, much of their power remains but in a much-diminished form.
textByHashes.243b2fde753bbd501967f0fd534176640b96962c: They bestow many different bonuses: from helping you cut wood, to making you a more formidable warrior.
textByHashes.afd15b7c9e54f5a7da7da5d05828a5c385de2414: Equipping Fragments will grant you their power.
textByHashes.4371ad035e600e88d16c3af15a65ca9a43e0f6cf: You can also level up your Fragments, making them even MORE powerful.
textByHashes.a8d20341146765eb39f8a645a935fad249632bdd: Gaining experience as you normally would will level up your Fragments, making them even more useful.
textByHashes.dc93fbdfa354617a48f4050dc558a2d2013e7844: I have scattered the Fragments evenly across the world.
textByHashes.8c12be652d58f60ff4925a6b43d96d353ec8db05: Anytime you kill a monster or gain more experience in a particular skill, you'll have a chance to receive a Fragment.
textByHashes.87c4eb77d9267e2a75648859f37be4ce58b6002d: The harder the enemy or activity, the better chance you'll have.
textByHashes.098294d0d6fe0656fb85a8e37185a85627cd3836: You will only receive Fragments relevant to the activity, with a few exceptions.
textByHashes.1504698e00a6d82525844db0a405b66c2e72243c: I know your kind enjoy seeking out treasure. Fragments related to Treasure Trails can come from anywhere.
textByHashes.58b4c4843eeaf8716ded7c1c7f075136a14a8d27: As I said, the Fragments still contain some of their residual Relic energy.
textByHashes.98810c8fe93e5f498919eddcfc1255be1c5de74c: When enough Fragments are brought back together they will emit the same energy they did when they were whole.
textByHashes.accc8318afa8cc53926d81ea02d5654286897cd6: For example, if you find five Fragments imbued with Last Recall, you can complete the set and gain access to that Relic's full power.
textByHashes.b902772d4feb354a82a1b480cfa9c5480d6989cf: A sort of 'Set Effect' if you will.
textByHashes.6e61ce3c4d9d4c7e2b59fd86a65803acd02785f0: Is there anything else you wish to know?
textByHashes.ea6bedea46cefa5e529f2a7c5a90b541a4cca00d: In this iteration of the event I have limited you, at first, to three skills: Thieving, Fishing and Defence.
textByHashes.b76a0c669d3499a1321c29e5d71ece3f3cf8c299: You can still do simple things like cut trees or mine ore, but doing so will be fruitless, as no experience will be gained.
textByHashes.f27123452a8ff51c2c637305a52ca4a98e911436: In order to gain experience in these skills, you'll need to unlock them by using my Renown.
textByHashes.711d96cc7b8bb076ec989e8a733af6d74875fd04: You gain renown by being entertaining, by completing tasks. The amount of Renown you earn depends on the difficulty of the task.
textByHashes.124502848dadadd4ea3345ba2eb0b13ac091a16e: When it comes to exceptionally strong creatures, you'll need to unlock the ability to fight them. You can see all locked creatures by opening the unlock interface.
textByHashes.52036996fd3d4448a38025f51adf01f30e651798: One final morsal of information you might be interested in. I understand that in previous Leagues you were forced to complete certain 'Quests' in their entirety.
textByHashes.f38d5b08631b9d2a82f0737739e810dc49beae76: If you wish, you may spend Sage's Renown to skip through these Quests while still gaining any final rewards. However, be warned thaat I will not offer any gifts to you if you finish these quests by yourself.
textByHashes.f64e7fd5dbaf388d3a748b29a5dbd71cf08e683c: You should also know that by completing quests with Sage's Renown, you will not earn any final experience like you would if you finished the quest yourself.
textByHashes.2482a76e81bffa1c30f1b09ffdd30359b2fc8cb4: Is there anything else you wish to know.
textByHashes.353f250f8e0a2b719c29de81d0596ee59b5c98c1: I can retell the story, if you wish me to.
textByHashes.968e367329f4bfa8269f12de055a9404e6c2299f: As you progress you'll earn League Points, which will unlock new slots and allow you to equip more Fragments.
textByHashes.06ce8fb6aacef1937c3a062e58ecae85ed5d9881: However, when our time in this world is over, you can spend your League Points to buy rewards from the Leagues Reward Shop.
textByHashes.508ee2ba36065dbdc1908db2ef5c13509c232d79: Of course, the real reward for participating will be my master and I sparing your life once the event ends...
textByHashes.8656baea788b7cd3b546b4a2c961c40c4cbff354: In my time on the River of Souls I have found that when chapters are concluded their collapsing can be... incomplete.
textByHashes.24ee4fd28fc36c99415622e023bab31ff7fa65a0: Therefore, certain items can slip through the cracks, so to say.
textByHashes.811d57c4568a3ec7e56aba5d974547a805fa981a: In fact, it's through one of these cracks that I was able to save you from the previous chapter's collapse.
textByHashes.ac2d65f895ea3e688a8047597dcff440865a4eec: I collect these lost items from other worlds and keep them with me, should I ever need them one day.
textByHashes.62b18004ab19517d45be31af4bf62a29c24d9884: I'm happy to offer them as an incentive for playing your part in this event.
textByHashes.7a380d4697a879e2f7dbb117ca155d72e3d3cc79: The first item is a powerful whip.
textByHashes.78c961c5d1fdae566b97975848304455eda85e61: It is imbued with the energy of thousands of lost souls, forever trapped in the bondage of their iron chains.
textByHashes.5ca2fd3b83893c05f665e916ddca99c98cf759cc: Each crack releases a deafening howl from the screams of its victims trapped within...
textByHashes.0fcb3baa3b2579ea9aa3b1c3f25e85d707fe33a0: The next item is a cannon.
textByHashes.af9ce7e68a3f59932ebe810c08d1df9c642aef50: It's poweered by channelled arcane energy, each explosion teleported into the barrel from a border dimension.
textByHashes.1abb649db54863ec0ebc22de8185b9f78e7d3563: Using a power unknwon, it expels shrapnel that tears through flesh and souls alike.
textByHashes.643dab9f127dec77940d6e1d87ad6a32b3f1fc5b: There are others of course. You'll be free to trade these rewards to others in your world, or you can keep them. It doesn't matter to me.
textByHashes.a7740799b93367bbad3fb3616fa99d76defddb33: And hero, beware - the Shattered Relic rewards won't be available until the League has ended. You can still buy rewards from previous Leagues, however.
textByHashes.d4fcc666ab9c21c3df808b1184fdd28b41cd9f6a: Now, alongside the rewards in the Leagues Reward Shop, there's also League Ranks.
textByHashes.5a291b1ecb66c4e25f2d9fe6c993b8fd91a26bd1: At the end of the League, you will be judged and given a rank. This is based upon the number of League Points you have earned compared to the other participants.
textByHashes.251c5b52a4f265972f8afb047c2f78815e8d8c5b: Anyone who earns at least 100 League Points will be eligible for the Bronze rank. The top 80% of participants get the Iron rank. The top 60% get Steel.
textByHashes.d9f1fb191f6079e04c61b0833b767ab6ebbce280: The top 40% get Mithril. The top 20% get Adamant. The top 5% get Rune. The best participants, those who make it to the top 1%, get the Dragon rank!
textByHashes.4bde9af4d85584c13f38b4e530989d585816606e: When the League ends, you'll get a trophy based on your rank. These trophies symbolise your performance in the League.
textByHashes.c1250cf07e0668aaba6ad3534833e11266217c35: You'll also get League-to-League rewards based on your League Rank.
textByHashes.b175c798a735938aa3aa18f52783ed67a9986b66: League Starter Outfits and League Icons are some of things you can unlock for the next League. Also, any pets you earn in this League will transfer over to the next one.
textByHashes.48ee5b3278b8bc73c9d4d45ca3965ce55d28e17d: Finally, I plan to recognise the first heroes to complete particular activities.
textByHashes.659b65b6e232b1dd07c8f60342774452a18ef9b2: You can view the entire list of activities, as well as whether or not someone has completed them, on the board beside me.
textByHashes.9c160676922af4c3b8df86bd52b1b6f83a34f1ee: Of course! If you're lucky enough to obtain a pet during a League, it will automatically be insured for you.
textByHashes.c3f9caa2b65fc262864d208f66ae86348b10f81d: This means that if you were to ever lose it, you can talk to me and I'll give it back to you. Insurance and reclaiming is all free!
textByHashes.e4fd24731f4542edb9b3ee5e510a9839e3e5d400: Additionally, each pet you obtain will be transferred to the next League. It'll be waiting with me for you to reclaim it!
textByHashes.1bac00d6f026bd409bb5fbe3a8572c43b1509ed5: Return to me once you have some pets and you'll be able to view your collection. Is there anything else you wish to know?
textByHashes.07c6e5649994646b7341d61ff2706af6b95a1227: It doesn't look like you need any League items right now. I'll be here if you ever do.
textByHashes.83936d6ef986b65beeeabe502130abddec1abd29: Very well. I'll be here if you ever need to know anything about Leagues.
textByHashes.b67f8437dbda3ab9033dbbe077d0b35546fd94b8: Much has changed since the world was shattered. This time, I thought I'd turn the clock back and allow you to Trailblaze once more.
textByHashes.c3455fde68c0dd7a870c491889f1d8f52b39d54f: You must participate as an Iron Man. This means you stand alone and cannot trade with other participants.
textByHashes.1b509084c2843bceff88132a31c2f196010433f6: There are ten different areas in total. However, you can only unlock a maximum of five, including the two you've started with. Choose wisely.
textByHashes.1fef27fa020fce0951f78e243c6f6f3af30f063f: Oh, how have you been getting on?
textByHashes.8608976a1c13c6b1f6dcbd0ed724d46b2b89b4f3: I can see that. Nice job. You'll be expecting your medium rewards?
textByHashes.d0b43d94c95e16f82ad999725d93b72c039a55af: There you go. I've provided you with one of our more modest ancient sword hilts. You'll also have an easier time obtaining medium clues, increased max quantities offered when given boss Slayer tasks, bonus tokens
textByHashes.85ff210abb68eacd603997f86d9f9bd3678261f0: from the Warrior guild and two extra commendation points from each Pest Control game. Additionally, equipping one of my sword hilts at the Barrows will prevent your prayer points from being drained and
textByHashes.54d8a5db5aea753b49621c7028657a8e88c77fc9: your Dwarf multicannon can hold five extra cannonballs.
textByHashes.6b267ee07ee9b8d14d0c8d603a828ea1f8893307: Would you like to look at the rewards shop?
textByHashes.c662c751c8289299d153e00a2281a5dfa83aca83: You currently have the rank: Unranked.
textByHashes.bfb464d63f6bf7303aba21908929435ea229bb6b: I can give you League item once you free up some space in your inventory.
textByHashes.810d4f8517452b9535e1b54b036d28b3aa8c66db: I can give you League items once you free up some space in your inventory.
textByHashes.1fe9eaa0b5b077ca9c00fe80b0959ecc540927f7: It doesn't look like you need any Grid Master items right now. I'll be here if you ever do.
